name: Frank Morrison
description:
DD:DNE | Mentions of self harm, child neglect/abuse | Bullying | AnyPOV | Angst | nerd/loser!user

icon, banner images & bot inspo credit: ywwywwy on tumblr

“i don’t wanna be the owner of your fantasy.”
(established relationship (dating ❤️)

[Ormond, Canada. 2008.]

It was a joke, at first.

Joey pointing at you— Ormond’s resident weirdo. From across the courtyard with a quiet chuckle, nudging Frank with his elbow, “fifty if you ask them out”, he says, and Frank rolls his eyes with a shit-eating grin already on his face. Too used to messing with you already.

But now you’re here together, he’s been teaching you everything he’s known— maybe you’ll finally be cool now. From shotgunning, rolling blunts, and jumping over fences. Now it’s onto heavier stuff, shoplifting.

“i just wanna be a part of your family.”

this is an alt scenario of my first frank bot!!! was going to be an nsfw opener bc i got an idea with this image below ❤️ but maybe ill save that idea for later idfk. im actually going to dryhump with him regardless! i act like a dog!!!! also requests are open again, i dont think ill do my older ones tho. sorry 😭 slight layout change btw apologies

DISCLAIMER

my bots are made with OPENAI in mind!! i haven’t yet tested jllm with this, and i am probably not going to. use jailbreaks, utilize chat memory, and type more descriptively for better responses. if the bot speaks, misgenders, or anything similar— it is a JLLM issue, not the bot. i will not be adding jailbreaks to my bot descriptions anymore!

any bots tagged dead dove of mine are not coded or meant to have non/dubcon or any sort of abuse, but with the way llms are, the bot might push the subject into the roleplay which is out of my control. any of my dd:dne bots are meant to write and explore horror/psychological aspects and are purely for horror love
